signatures.name: XSS Attempt
signatures.notes: Added character budgets on wildcards to reduce ReDoS risk. Added template injection pattern {{...}} and <details ontoggle> polyglot. Capped on* attribute value length.

signatures.name: Command Injection
signatures.notes: Added \n, %0a, %0d, \r as shell metachar prefixes — newline injection bypass fixed. Added negative lookahead on 'id' to avoid FP on 'identifier'. Added Windows && and || are covered via | already.

signatures.name: Directory Traversal
signatures.notes: Added Unicode overlong encoding bypasses (%c0%ae, %c0%2e, %e0%80%ae — classic JVM/IIS bypass). Added triple-encoding (%255c). Minimum depth of 3 traversals required to reduce FP on relative paths.

signatures.name: Suspicious User Agent
signatures.notes: Added modern recon tools: ffuf, feroxbuster, httpx, katana, rustscan, interactsh (OAST callback tool), trufflehog, gitleaks.

signatures.name: Sensitive File Access
signatures.notes: Fixed grouping bug — .htpasswd and .htaccess moved out of the SSH block into their own alternation. Added .npmrc, pip.conf (credential files), and AWS IMDS paths (169.254.169.254 and /latest/meta-data/) for SSRF coverage.

signatures.name: Command Injection Encoded
signatures.notes: Fixed typo: %77hoami -> %77%68%6f%61%6d%69 (fully percent-encoded 'whoami'). Added %0a/%0d (encoded newline) as separator. Added more encoded commands: sh=%73%68, nc=%6e%63, python=%70%79%74%68%6f%6e, perl=%70%65%72%6c. Second branch catches mixed encode/plaintext.

signatures.name: Known C2 Pattern
signatures.notes: Replaced .*? with .{0,100} to prevent ReDoS on large bodies. Added msiexec, InstallUtil, MSBuild (LOLBins). Added -EncodedCommand, Invoke-WebRequest, New-Object Net.WebClient. Added PowerShell flag variants (-enc, -nop, -noni, -w hidden).

signatures.name: Outbound C2 Beacon
signatures.notes: Added Ruby socket reverse shell, Go dial pattern, PowerShell TCPClient. Scoped wget/curl to http/https schemes to reduce FP on local file curl. Added character budget to nc pattern.

signatures.name: Data Exfiltration Pattern
signatures.notes: Major FP reduction: removed bare 'password', 'secret', 'ssn', 'social security' keywords. Now requires key=value assignment context for secrets. Bearer token minimum length raised to 40. Credit card patterns replaced with BIN-specific prefixes (Visa=4, MC=5[1-5], Amex=3[47]) rather than any 16 digits. Remove 'db_password' bare keyword.

signatures.name: Reverse Shell Attempt
signatures.notes: Added ncat --exec, PowerShell TCPClient reverse shell, xterm -display (older but still seen). Slightly relaxed python socket wildcard budget from 30 to 50 chars to reduce FN on varied spacing.
